event: Still Life with Jug and Fruit
description: A still life painting showing a large brown ceramic jug at right, a green bowl containing red and yellow fruit at left, and additional fruit (oranges, lemons) on small plates in the foreground. The background is dark purple-blue. The brushwork is bold and expressive, with strong warm tones of orange, brown, and golden-yellow against the cool dark background. The style is expressionist with simplified, solid forms.
